summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary
ASL Solicitors provides expert criminal defence and legal aid representation across the UK, covering serious crime, fraud, sexual offences, violent crime, road traffic, and family law, with offices in Birmingham and Walsall.

- **Company Name:** ASL Solicitors (ASL Solicitors & Advocates)
- **Description:** A UK law firm offering trusted legal representation with a client-first approach, specialising in criminal defence (including Legal Aid), fraud, sexual offences, violent crime, public order, drug offences, road traffic, and family law.
- **Locations:** 35 Bull Street, Birmingham, B4 6AF & Townend House, Walsall, WS1 1NS
- **Contact:** 0121 507 1030 | 07590 396168 (24/7) | reception@aslsolicitors.co.uk
- **Services Offered:** Criminal Defence, Free Police Station Advice, Court Representation, Fraud & Financial Crime, Sexual Offences, Violent Crime, Public Order Offences, Drug Offences, Road Traffic Offences, Family Law & Conveyancing, Legal Aid and private fee options.
